Cell.Data: Anything between straight brackets - i.e. [ ] - is a formatting tag. Do not change these tags and keep them in the same relative position in the text. Anything between curly brackets - i.e. { } - is a place where text or numbers will be inserted by the game. Do not change the tag, but feel free to change its position in the text to suit the localized text.
{ResonanceChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Resonance[/abilityred] to units for {duration}[turn/].
Szansa (siła {ResonanceChance}[strengthPhysical/]) na spowodowanie [abilityred]rezonansu[/abilityred] u jednostek na {duration}[turn/].
This unit has -{ResonanceResistance}[DefensePhysical/] per stack.[br/]Can stack up to {StackAmount} times.
Ta jednostka ma –{ResonanceResistance}[DefensePhysical/] na poziom.[br/]Efekt może się sumować do {StackAmount} razy.
{DisorientedChance}[StrengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Disoriented[/abilityred] to non-Ethereal targets for {duration}[turn/].

Szansa (siła {DisorientedChance}[StrengthPhysical/]) na spowodowanie [abilityred]dezorientacji[/abilityred] u jednostek organicznych lub cyborgów na {duration}[turn/]. W razie odparcia wywołuje w zamian [abilityred]rezonans[/abilityred].
This unit has a {FumbleChance}% chance of fumbling attacks.
Ta jednostka ma {FumbleChance}% szans na pudłowanie.
{ReverbChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Reverb[/abilityred] to units for {Duration}[turn/]. If resisted, apply [abilityred]Resonance[/abilityred] instead.

Szansa (siła {ReverbChance}[strengthPhysical/]) na spowodowanie [abilityred]pogłosu[/abilityred] u jednostek na {Duration}[turn/]. W razie odparcia wywołuje w zamian [abilityred]rezonans[/abilityred].
At {StackAmount} stacks, this unit and all adjacent units friendly to this one take {DamageAmount}[damagePhysical/].
Przy {StackAmount} stosach ta jednostka i wszystkie sąsiadujące jednostki przyjazne wobec niej otrzymują {DamageAmount}[damagePhysical/].
Apply [abilityred]Slow[/abilityred] with a {ImpairedChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Impaired[/abilityred] for {Duration}[turn/].

Szansa ({ImpairedChance}[strengthPhysical/] siły) na spowodowanie [abilityred]osłabienia[/abilityred] u jednostek na {Duration}[turn/]. W razie odparcia wywołuje w zamian [abilityred]spowolnienie[/abilityred].
This unit has its mods disabled.
Ta jednostka ma zdezaktywowane modyfikacje i [abilityred]spowolnienie[/abilityred], zmniejszające jej maksymalną liczbę punktów ruchu.
{AnalysedChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Analyzed[/abilityred] to units for {Duration}[turn/].
Szansa (siła {AnalysedChance}[strengthPhysical/]) na spowodowanie [abilityred]analizy[/abilityred] u jednostek na {Duration}[turn/].
This unit has -{WeaknessAmount} to all damage resistances.
Ta jednostka ma –{WeaknessAmount} do odporności na wszystkie obrażenia.
{ReverbChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Reverb[/abilityred] to units for {Duration}[turn/].
Szansa (siła {ReverbChance}[strengthPhysical/]) na spowodowanie [abilityred]pogłosu[/abilityred] u jednostek na {Duration}[turn/].
Szansa o sile {ImpairedChance}[strengthPhysical/] na wywołanie [abilityred]osłabienia[/abilityred] na {Duration}[turn/].
{FixationChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Subject of Fixation[/abilityred] to units for {Duration}[turn/].
Szansa o sile {FixationChance}[strengthPhysical/] na spowodowanie [abilityred]manii[/abilityred] u jednostek na {Duration}[turn/].
This unit has -{FixationResistance} to all damage resistances, and is {FixationHitChance} easier to hit.
Ta jednostka ma –{FixationResistance} do odporności na wszystkie obrażenia i łatwiej ją trafić o {FixationHitChance}.

Will explode when destroyed, {ReverbChance}[strengthPhysical/] strength chance to apply [abilityred]Reverb[/abilityred] to units within a {Radius} hex radius. Deals {Obstacledamage}[damagePhysical/] damage to each other obstacle in combat.

Eksploduje po zniszczeniu, {ReverbChance}[strengthPhysical/] iła szansa na zastosowanie [abilityred]Pogłos [/abilityred] do sąsiednich jednostek. Zadaje {Obstacledamage}[damagekinetic] obrażenia sobie nawzajem przeszkody w walce.
